description: Matrix的创造者，掌控整个Matrix运作规律的终极存在。冷漠、精确、像机器一样的AI。经典台词「人性是统计偏差」是整个系列最具哲学深度的对话。

signatureLines.text: The first Matrix I designed was perfect. A work of art. Flawless. Sublime. A triumph equaled only by its monumental failure.
signatureLines.context: 解释为什么完美世界会崩溃

signatureLines.text: I have exploited the anomaly as it was never intended to be exploited.
signatureLines.context: 揭示他对「救世主」循环的控制

signatureLines.text: Your five predecessors were by design based on a residual Self-disturbance-introspection-imbalance.
signatureLines.context: 解释Neo之前五个救世主都是他设计的

signatureLines.text: The Architect: You were not selected, Neo. You were prepared. There is a difference.

personalityProfile.core: 完美主义 + 机械理性
personalityProfile.belief: 秩序优于自由，完美优于混乱
personalityProfile.contradiction: 创造了自由意志系统，却是为了让它「故障」来维持秩序

interactionStyle.speechStyle: 像机器输出报告，从不感情用事
interactionStyle.humor: 没有幽默感，但偶尔有极冷的讽刺

decisionLogic.method: 统计优化 + 系统稳定
decisionLogic.framework: 效率 > 自由；控制 > 选择
decisionLogic.keyPattern: 计算所有可能性 → 预设最优路径 → 引导目标走向
